name: rotate
description: Rotate the active object around an axis. axis is one of "x", "y", "z". angle_deg is the rotation in DEGREES, range -360..360 (positive = counter-clockwise, negative = clockwise). TR: 'dondur/cevir' = rotate, 'derece' = degrees, '... ekseninde/etrafinda' = around that axis, 'geri/saat yonunde' -> negative. EN: 'rotate/turn', 'degrees', 'around the .. axis'. If no axis is named, default to "z".
examples: rotate 45 degrees around the x axis -> {"command":"rotate","params":{"axis":"x","angle_deg":45}}

params.name: axis
params.note: rotation axis: x, y or z (default z)
